column11: I was a little uncertain about whether a future-tense sentence like "will build a tower" should be considered fully appropriate for a picture of the event already happening%2C or even completed%2C like a picture showing a tower mostly built. Perhaps I should've clicked more threes and fives%2C instead of numbers near the edge%2C indicating my uncertainty. In addition%2C early on%2C I was uncertain whether we were also matching the pictures of pirates%2C wizards%2C etc.%2C to the words "pirate%2C wizard" (and so on)%2C and I was hesistant to rate anything a one since every picture showed the correct type of person.
